title: Empty screen during first deployment
symptom: When attempting to deploy a project for the first time, the user sees an empty screen instead of a successful deployment message.
not_this_if: Deployment works after connecting to GitHub
root_cause: The deployment process requires a connection to a GitHub repository to fetch the project files. Without this connection, the deployment cannot proceed, resulting in an empty screen.
fix_steps: Connect your project to a GitHub repository
agent_instruction: Ensure your project is connected to GitHub and attempt the deployment again.
